name: 01 Users Groups
title: Identity Management: The Ultimate Guide to Users and Groups
description: The bible of account administration in Linux. From anatomy of /etc/passwd to permission management with sudo, explained step by step for beginners.
path: Arborito Library (EN) / Engineering & Technology / Information Technology: Operating Systems / Linux Ecosystem / Linux Operator Jr. / Module 3: System Administration / 01 Users Groups

name: 02 Permissions Ownership
title: Permissions and Ownership: The System Guardian (chmod, chown)
description: The definitive guide (+500 lines) to understanding Linux security. Octal math, special bits (SUID, Sticky), and why 'chmod 777' is a deadly sin.
path: Arborito Library (EN) / Engineering & Technology / Information Technology: Operating Systems / Linux Ecosystem / Linux Operator Jr. / Module 3: System Administration / 02 Permissions Ownership

name: 03 Data Streams
title: Data Streams: Linux Plumbing (Pipes & Redirections)
description: The definitive guide (+500 lines) to understanding how data flows in Linux. Master stdin, stdout, stderr, pipes, redirections, and the art of chaining commands.
path: Arborito Library (EN) / Engineering & Technology / Information Technology: Operating Systems / Linux Ecosystem / Linux Operator Jr. / Module 3: System Administration / 03 Data Streams

name: 04 Process Control
title: Process Control: The Orchestra Conductor (ps, top, kill)
description: The definitive guide (+500 lines) to mastering what happens in your CPU. Learn to read 'top', understand PIDs, kill zombies, and manage background processes.
path: Arborito Library (EN) / Engineering & Technology / Information Technology: Operating Systems / Linux Ecosystem / Linux Operator Jr. / Module 3: System Administration / 04 Process Control

name: 05 Archive Compression
title: Archiving and Compression: The Master Guide (tar, gzip, zip)
description: The definitive guide (+500 lines) on how to package and compress data in Linux. Master 'tar', understand difference archiving/compression, handle gzip, bzip2, xz, zip.
path: Arborito Library (EN) / Engineering & Technology / Information Technology: Operating Systems / Linux Ecosystem / Linux Operator Jr. / Module 3: System Administration / 05 Archive Compression
